content.query:
SET NOCOUNT ON;

------------------------------------------------------------
-- EDIT THESE
------------------------------------------------------------
DECLARE @migration_root NVARCHAR(4000);
DECLARE @export_schema NVARCHAR(128);
DECLARE @data_source NVARCHAR(128);
DECLARE @file_format NVARCHAR(128);

SET @migration_root = N'synapse-migration/run_2026_04_08';
SET @export_schema  = N'_mig';
SET @data_source    = N'target_adls';
SET @file_format    = N'_mig_parquet_format';

------------------------------------------------------------
-- GENERAL VARIABLES
------------------------------------------------------------
DECLARE @sql NVARCHAR(MAX);
DECLARE @export_schema_q NVARCHAR(300);
DECLARE @data_source_q NVARCHAR(300);
DECLARE @file_format_q NVARCHAR(300);

DECLARE @schema_name NVARCHAR(128);
DECLARE @table_name NVARCHAR(128);
DECLARE @data_location NVARCHAR(4000);
DECLARE @schema_q NVARCHAR(300);
DECLARE @table_q NVARCHAR(300);
DECLARE @export_obj_name NVARCHAR(128);
DECLARE @export_obj_q NVARCHAR(300);

DECLARE @i INT;
DECLARE @imax INT;

SET @export_schema_q = N'[' + @export_schema + N']';
SET @data_source_q   = N'[' + @data_source + N']';
SET @file_format_q   = N'[' + @file_format + N']';

------------------------------------------------------------
-- PREP OBJECTS
------------------------------------------------------------
IF NOT EXISTS
(
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.schemas
    WHERE name = @export_schema
)
BEGIN
    SET @sql = N'CREATE SCHEMA ' + @export_schema_q + N';';
    EXEC(@sql);
END;

IF NOT EXISTS
(
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.external_file_formats
    WHERE name = @file_format
)
BEGIN
    SET @sql = N'
    CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT ' + @file_format_q + N'
    WITH
    (
        FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET
    );';
    EXEC(@sql);
END;

------------------------------------------------------------
-- DROP OLD MANIFEST TABLES / EXTERNAL TABLES
------------------------------------------------------------
IF EXISTS
(
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.tables t
    JOIN sys.schemas s
      ON s.schema_id = t.schema_id
    WHERE s.name = @export_schema
      AND t.name = N'manifest_tables'
)
BEGIN
    SET @sql = N'DROP TABLE ' + @export_schema_q + N'.[manifest_tables];';
    EXEC(@sql);
END;

IF EXISTS
(
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.tables t
    JOIN sys.schemas s
      ON s.schema_id = t.schema_id
    WHERE s.name = @export_schema
      AND t.name = N'manifest_columns'
)
BEGIN
    SET @sql = N'DROP TABLE ' + @export_schema_q + N'.[manifest_columns];';
    EXEC(@sql);
END;

IF EXISTS
(
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.external_tables t
    JOIN sys.schemas s
      ON s.schema_id = t.schema_id
    WHERE s.name = @export_schema
      AND t.name = N'xt_manifest_tables'
)
BEGIN
    SET @sql = N'DROP EXTERNAL TABLE ' + @export_schema_q + N'.[xt_manifest_tables];';
    EXEC(@sql);
END;

IF EXISTS
(
    SELECT 1
    FROM sys.external_tables t
    JOIN sys.schemas s
      ON s.schema_id = t.schema_id
    WHERE s.name = @export_schema
      AND t.name = N'xt_manifest_columns'
)
BEGIN
    SET @sql = N'DROP EXTERNAL TABLE ' + @export_schema_q + N'.[xt_manifest_columns];';
    EXEC(@sql);
END;

------------------------------------------------------------
-- MANIFEST TABLES
------------------------------------------------------------
SET @sql = N'
CREATE TABLE ' + @export_schema_q + N'.[manifest_tables]
(
    schema_name            NVARCHAR(128)  NOT NULL,
    table_name             NVARCHAR(128)  NOT NULL,
    source_object_type     NVARCHAR(20)   NOT NULL,
    distribution_policy    NVARCHAR(60)   NULL,
    distribution_column    NVARCHAR(128)  NULL,
    target_index_type      NVARCHAR(60)   NOT NULL,
    clustered_index_column NVARCHAR(128)  NULL,
    data_location          NVARCHAR(4000) NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);';
EXEC(@sql);

SET @sql = N'
CREATE TABLE ' + @export_schema_q + N'.[manifest_columns]
(
    schema_name      NVARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
    table_name       NVARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
    column_id        INT           NOT NULL,
    column_name      NVARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
    type_name        NVARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
    max_length       INT           NULL,
    precision_value  INT           NULL,
    scale_value      INT           NULL,
    is_nullable      BIT           NOT NULL,
    collation_name   NVARCHAR(128) NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);';
EXEC(@sql);

------------------------------------------------------------
-- INVENTORY SOURCE OBJECTS
------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#objects') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #objects;

CREATE TABLE #objects
(
    schema_name        NVARCHAR(128)  NOT NULL,
    table_name         NVARCHAR(128)  NOT NULL,
    object_id          INT            NOT NULL,
    source_object_type NVARCHAR(20)   NOT NULL,
    data_location      NVARCHAR(4000) NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);

INSERT INTO #objects
(
    schema_name,
    table_name,
    object_id,
    source_object_type,
    data_location
)
SELECT
    s.name,
    t.name,
    t.object_id,
    N'INTERNAL',
    @migration_root + N'/data/' + s.name + N'/' + t.name + N'/'
FROM sys.tables t
JOIN sys.schemas s
  ON s.schema_id = t.schema_id
WHERE s.name <> @export_schema
  AND t.name NOT IN (N'manifest_tables', N'manifest_columns')

UNION ALL

SELECT
    s.name,
    t.name,
    t.object_id,
    N'EXTERNAL',
    @migration_root + N'/data/' + s.name + N'/' + t.name + N'/'
FROM sys.external_tables t
JOIN sys.schemas s
  ON s.schema_id = t.schema_id
WHERE s.name <> @export_schema;

------------------------------------------------------------
-- BUILD TABLE MANIFEST
------------------------------------------------------------
INSERT INTO [_mig].[manifest_tables]
(
    schema_name,
    table_name,
    source_object_type,
    distribution_policy,
    distribution_column,
    target_index_type,
    clustered_index_column,
    data_location
)
SELECT
    o.schema_name,
    o.table_name,
    o.source_object_type,
    CASE
        WHEN o.source_object_type = N'EXTERNAL' THEN N'ROUND_ROBIN'
        ELSE COALESCE(dp.distribution_policy_desc, N'ROUND_ROBIN')
    END,
    CASE
        WHEN o.source_object_type = N'EXTERNAL' THEN NULL
        ELSE dist_col.name
    END,
    CASE
        WHEN o.source_object_type = N'EXTERNAL' THEN N'HEAP'
        WHEN i.type_desc = N'CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE' THEN N'CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX'
        WHEN i.type_desc = N'CLUSTERED' THEN N'CLUSTERED INDEX'
        WHEN i.type_desc = N'HEAP' THEN N'HEAP'
        ELSE N'CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX'
    END,
    CASE
        WHEN i.type_desc = N'CLUSTERED' THEN idx_col.name
        ELSE NULL
    END,
    o.data_location
FROM #objects o
LEFT JOIN sys.pdw_table_distribution_properties dp
  ON dp.object_id = o.object_id
LEFT JOIN sys.pdw_column_distribution_properties dcp
  ON dcp.object_id = o.object_id
 AND dcp.distribution_ordinal = 1
LEFT JOIN sys.columns dist_col
  ON dist_col.object_id = dcp.object_id
 AND dist_col.column_id = dcp.column_id
LEFT JOIN sys.indexes i
  ON i.object_id = o.object_id
 AND i.index_id IN (0, 1)
 AND i.is_hypothetical = 0
LEFT JOIN sys.index_columns ic
  ON ic.object_id = i.object_id
 AND ic.index_id = i.index_id
 AND ic.key_ordinal = 1
LEFT JOIN sys.columns idx_col
  ON idx_col.object_id = ic.object_id
 AND idx_col.column_id = ic.column_id;

------------------------------------------------------------
-- BUILD COLUMN MANIFEST
------------------------------------------------------------
INSERT INTO [_mig].[manifest_columns]
(
    schema_name,
    table_name,
    column_id,
    column_name,
    type_name,
    max_length,
    precision_value,
    scale_value,
    is_nullable,
    collation_name
)
SELECT
    o.schema_name,
    o.table_name,
    c.column_id,
    c.name,
    ty.name,
    c.max_length,
    c.precision,
    c.scale,
    c.is_nullable,
    c.collation_name
FROM #objects o
JOIN sys.columns c
  ON c.object_id = o.object_id
JOIN sys.types ty
  ON ty.user_type_id = c.user_type_id;

------------------------------------------------------------
-- EXPORT ALL TABLES TO ADLS WITH CETAS
------------------------------------------------------------
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#export_list') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #export_list;

CREATE TABLE #export_list
(
    rn              INT            NOT NULL,
    schema_name     NVARCHAR(128)  NOT NULL,
    table_name      NVARCHAR(128)  NOT NULL,
    data_location   NVARCHAR(4000) NOT NULL,
    export_obj_name NVARCHAR(128)  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);

INSERT INTO #export_list
(
    rn,
    schema_name,
    table_name,
    data_location,
    export_obj_name
)
SELECT
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY schema_name, table_name),
    schema_name,
    table_name,
    data_location,
    N'xt_' + CAST(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY schema_name, table_name) AS NVARCHAR(20))
FROM #objects;

SELECT @i = 1, @imax = MAX(rn) FROM #export_list;

WHILE @i <= @imax
BEGIN
    SELECT
        @schema_name = schema_name,
        @table_name = table_name,
        @data_location = data_location,
        @export_obj_name = export_obj_name
    FROM #export_list
    WHERE rn = @i;

    SET @schema_q = N'[' + @schema_name + N']';
    SET @table_q  = N'[' + @table_name + N']';
    SET @export_obj_q = N'[' + @export_obj_name + N']';

    IF EXISTS
    (
        SELECT 1
        FROM sys.external_tables t
        JOIN sys.schemas s
          ON s.schema_id = t.schema_id
        WHERE s.name = @export_schema
          AND t.name = @export_obj_name
    )
    BEGIN
        SET @sql = N'DROP EXTERNAL TABLE ' + @export_schema_q + N'.' + @export_obj_q + N';';
        EXEC(@sql);
    END;

    SET @sql = N'
    CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE ' + @export_schema_q + N'.' + @export_obj_q + N'
    WITH
    (
        LOCATION = ''' + @data_location + N''',
        DATA_SOURCE = ' + @data_source_q + N',
        FILE_FORMAT = ' + @file_format_q + N'
    )
    AS
    SELECT *
    FROM ' + @schema_q + N'.' + @table_q + N';';

    PRINT N'Exporting ' + @schema_q + N'.' + @table_q;
    EXEC(@sql);

    SET @i = @i + 1;
END;

------------------------------------------------------------
-- EXPORT MANIFESTS
------------------------------------------------------------
SET @sql = N'
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE ' + @export_schema_q + N'.[xt_manifest_tables]
WITH
(
    LOCATION = ''' + @migration_root + N'/manifest/tables/'',
    DATA_SOURCE = ' + @data_source_q + N',
    FILE_FORMAT = ' + @file_format_q + N'
)
AS
SELECT * FROM ' + @export_schema_q + N'.[manifest_tables];';
EXEC(@sql);

SET @sql = N'
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE ' + @export_schema_q + N'.[xt_manifest_columns]
WITH
(
    LOCATION = ''' + @migration_root + N'/manifest/columns/'',
    DATA_SOURCE = ' + @data_source_q + N',
    FILE_FORMAT = ' + @file_format_q + N'
)
AS
SELECT * FROM ' + @export_schema_q + N'.[manifest_columns];';
EXEC(@sql);

PRINT N'Export complete';
PRINT N'Migration root: ' + @migration_root;
